title: Cubed Optimized FPS
description: Cubed Optimized is a copilation of Mods and Tweaks to make your Minecraft run 100x better and faster than the original Minecraft!
body:
Cubed Optimized is a copilation of Mods and Tweaks to make your Minecraft run 100x better and faster than the original Minecraft!

![Sponsor Bisect Code "Cubed](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/b3bf9bf3-7e5d-427a-85ef-5c82d94f1fba.webp)

![Without Cubed Optimized](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cubed_Optimized/BH_CO_banner1.webp)

![Cubed Optimized no](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1099791670662410260/1102037029392494642/image.png)

![with cubed fps](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cubed_Optimized/BH_CO_banner2.webp)

 ![with cubed fps](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1099791670662410260/1102037164281303101/image.png)

 ![Amazing Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Cubed_Optimized/BH_CO_banner3.webp)


Amazing features that will revolutionize your gameplay:

1. ✔️ Enhanced Performance: Say goodbye to lag and hello to seamless gameplay. Even on lower-end machines, experience significant FPS improvements for a smoother adventure.

2. ✔️ Optimized Graphics: Immerse yourself in a beautifully detailed Minecraft world without any performance compromise. It's a visual treat!

3. ✔️ Reduced Lag: Whether you're embarking on a solo quest or battling it out in multiplayer, enjoy reduced latency and virtually zero lag.

4. 💎 3D Skin Layers: Stand out in the blocky world with customizable 3D skin layers. Your character has never looked this cool
 
5. 💄 Free Cosmetics: Dress your avatar in style with a vast selection of free cosmetics. With cosmetica, express your unique Minecraft fashion sense
 
6. ⏩ Fast World Creation (5-10 seconds): No more waiting around! Create your world in the blink of an eye and dive headfirst into your Minecraft adventure.

7. ⏩ Remove Reloading Screen: No more waiting around! Just continue playing (https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls)
